---
title: "05_interpretation_osterhoudt.md"
author: "lizzy osterhoudt"
date: "2026-02-26"
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

79517801 + 0 in total (QC-passed reads + QC-failed reads)
79513820 + 0 primary
0 + 0 secondary
3981 + 0 supplementary
0 + 0 duplicates
0 + 0 primary duplicates
120984 + 0 mapped (0.15% : N/A)
117003 + 0 primary mapped (0.15% : N/A)
79513820 + 0 paired in sequencing
39756911 + 0 read1
39756909 + 0 read2
102036 + 0 properly paired (0.13% : N/A)
103914 + 0 with itself and mate mapped
13089 + 0 singletons (0.02% : N/A)
68 + 0 with mate mapped to a different chr
34 + 0 with mate mapped to a different chr (mapQ>=5)

Depth
1321.7
